title: High frequency reference device
abstract: This invention provides a high frequency reference device that is characterized by small size, low power consumption, high performance, low complexity, and low cost. The disclosed high frequency reference device is comprised of three main elements: an integrated low frequency crystal oscillator, a filter to pass the required high frequency and reject all other harmonics, and a low cost buffer for the required output frequency signal.
claims: Claims CLAIMS: 1. A frequency reference device for generating a signal of a required nominal frequency, comprising (1) an integrated crystal oscillator arranged to generate a signal of frequency that is a fraction of the required nominal frequency, (2) a filter to pass the required nominal frequency, and (3) a buffer for outputting the signal of the required nominal frequency. 2. A frequency reference device according to claim 1, wherein the integrated crystal oscillator is arranged to generate a signal of frequency that is an odd order fraction of the required nominal frequency. 3. A frequency reference device according to claim 1, wherein the integrated crystal oscillator is arranged to generate a signal of frequency that is an even order fraction of the required nominal frequency. 4. A frequency reference device according to any one of claims 1 to 3, wherein the integrated crystal oscillator is arranged to generate a signal comprising a square wave. 5. A frequency reference device according to any one of claims 1 to 3, wherein the integrated crystal oscillator is arranged to generate a signal comprising a clipped sinewave. 6. A frequency reference device according to any one of claims 1 to 5, wherein the said integrated crystal oscillator is an integrated Temperature Compensated Crystal Oscillator (TCXO). 7. A frequency reference device according to any one of claims 1 to 5, wherein the said integrated crystal oscillator is an integrated Voltage Controlled Crystal Oscillator (VCXO). 8. A frequency reference device according to any one of claims 1 to 5, wherein the said integrated crystal oscillator is an integrated Voltage Controlled Temperature Compensated Crystal Oscillator (VCTCXO). 9. A frequency reference device according to any one of claims 1 to 5, wherein the said integrated crystal oscillator is an integrated Oven Controlled Crystal Oscillator (OCXO). 10. A frequency reference device according to any one of claims 1 to 9, wherein the said filter comprises a band pass and band reject filter arranged to pass the required nominal frequency and reject other frequencies. 11. A frequency reference device according to claim 10, wherein the said band pass and band reject filter comprises an inductor as part of both band pass and band reject circuits. 12. A frequency reference device according to claim 10, wherein the said band pass and band reject filter comprises a capacitive divider to control the output signal level, or for impedance matching, or for both purposes. 13. A frequency reference device according to any of claims 1 to 9, wherein the said filter is a filter comprising a mutually coupled pair of tuned circuits. 14. A frequency reference device according to claim 13, wherein the said filter comprising a mutually coupled pair of tuned circuits comprises a capacitive divider to control the output signal level, or for impedance matching, or for both purposes. 15. A frequency reference device according to any one of claims 1 to 14, wherein the said buffer is an integrated circuit arranged as an amplifier and buffer for the said frequency reference device's output signal. 16. A frequency reference device according to any one of claims 1 to 15 wherein the said integrated crystal oscillator is arranged to generate an output signal of frequency that is not substantially higher than 52MHz. 17. A frequency reference device according to any one of claims 1 to 16 wherein the said required nominal frequency is substantially higher than 52MHz.
